name: from main (#104): no --branch, cwd on main → the worktree's branch
from inside the worktree: cwd branch already the worktree branch → unchanged
explicit --branch overrides the resolved worktree branch
explicit --branch wins even with no worktree resolved
no worktree, no --branch → cwd branch (caller then validates/dies)
detached worktree (branch null) → falls back to cwd branch
